headline: PTC to Release Q2 Earnings: Here's What Investors Should Expect
summary: PTC heads into Q2 earnings with double-digit revenue and EPS growth expectations, strong ARR momentum and expanding AI-driven product capabilities.

raw.headline: PTC to Release Q2 Earnings: Here's What Investors Should Expect
raw.summary: PTC heads into Q2 earnings with double-digit revenue and EPS growth expectations, strong ARR momentum and expanding AI-driven product capabilities.

headline: PTC Codebeamer Replaces Legacy System at Hamilton Medical
summary: PTC (NASDAQ: PTC) today announced that Hamilton Medical, a global leader in intelligent mechanical ventilation solutions, selected PTC's Codebeamer® Application Lifecycle Management (ALM) solution to replace its legacy ALM system and paper-based processes. Further, PTC and Hamilton Medical, a long-term user of PTC's Windchill® Product Lifecycle Management (PLM) solution, have agreed to collaborate to strengthen mutual outcomes.
